## Quick PK status note
Based on the latest dosing config alone, the patient-specific dosing parameters are populated and internally consistent, and the embedded clinical notes do not indicate an obvious PK-related issue. That said, this file is a configuration snapshot rather than a live model validation output, so I cannot conclusively confirm current PK model stability from this file alone.
